title: cyathea boryana
intro: Cyathea boryana, also known as the Bory's tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the island of Réunion in the Indian Ocean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antiseptic. Cyathea boryana can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
